verses.1: “Moreover, take up a lamentation for the princes of Israel,
verses.3: She brought up one of her cubs.
verses.4: The nations also heard of him.
verses.5: “‘Now when she saw that she had waited,
verses.6: He went up and down among the lions.
verses.8: Then the nations attacked him on every side from the provinces.
verses.9: They put him in a cage with hooks,
verses.10: “‘Your mother was like a vine in your blood, planted by the waters.
verses.11: It had strong branches for the scepters of those who ruled.
verses.12: But it was plucked up in fury.
verses.13: Now it is planted in the wilderness,
verses.14: Fire has gone out of its branches.
